transcript: Speaker A: ನಮ್ಮ ಊರಲ್ಲಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಅಂದ್ರೆ ದೊಡ್ಡ ಪ್ರಾಬ್ಲಮ್ ಆಗ್ಬಿಟ್ಟಿದೆ. ಮಗ ಸ್ಕೂಲಲ್ಲಿ ಏನೇನೋ ಕೇಳ್ತಾರೆ, ಆದ್ರೆ ನನಗೆ ಆನ್ಸರ್ ಕೊಡೋಕೆ ಬರಲ್ಲ. ಟೀಚರ್ಸ್ ಕೂಡ ಎಲ್ಲಾ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಅಲ್ಲೇ ಹೇಳ್ತಾರೆ, ನನಗೆ ಅರ್ಥಾನೇ ಆಗಲ್ಲ. ತುಂಬಾ ಬೇಜಾರಾಗುತ್ತೆ. ಶಾಪ್ ಗೆ ಹೋದ್ರು ಸಿಂಪಲ್ ಕ್ವೆಶ್ಚನ್ಸ್ ಬಂದ್ರು ಹೆಸಿಟೇಟ್ ಆಗುತ್ತೆ. ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಬರಲ್ಲ ಅಂತ ಲೋ ಫೀಲ್ ಆಗುತ್ತೆ. ನಾನು ಟ್ರೈ ಮಾಡಿದೀನಿ ಆದ್ರೆ ಅಲೋನ್ ಆಗಿ ಆಗಲ್ಲ. [In our town, English has become a big problem. My son asks so many things from school, but I can't answer. Teachers also speak only in English, I don't understand at all. I feel very sad. Even when going to a shop, I hesitate for simple questions. I feel low because I don't know English. I have tried, but it doesn't work alone.] Speaker B: Don't worry Amma, English is not difficult. Speaker A: ನಿಜಾ? ನಾನು ಕೂಡ ಕಲಿಬಹುದಾ? [Really? Can I also learn?] Speaker B: Yes, SpeakX app ಇದೆ. ಸ್ಟೆಪ್ ಬೈ ಸ್ಟೆಪ್ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲ್ಸುತ್ತೆ. Let's start simple. How is your son doing in class? [Yes, there is the SpeakX app. It teaches English step-by-step. Let's start simple. How is your son doing in class?] Speaker A: How is my son doing in class? Speaker B: Good! Now say: What can he improve? Speaker A: What can he improve? ವಾವ್! ಇಷ್ಟು ಸಿಂಪಲ್ ಆಗಿ ಕಲಿಬಹುದು ಅಂತ ಗೊತ್ತಿರ್ಲಿಲ್ಲ. [Wow! I didn't know it could be learned so simply.] Speaker B: Daily just 15 minutes practice ಮಾಡಿ. You will improve. [Daily just 15 minutes practice. You will improve.] Speaker A: ಈಗ ಕಾನ್ಫಿಡೆನ್ಸ್ ಬರ್ತಿದೆ, ನನ್ನ ಮಗನ ಜೊತೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡಬಹುದು ಅಂತ. ಆದ್ರೆ ಇದೆಲ್ಲಾ ಕಾಸ್ಟ್ಲಿ ಇರಬಹುದು ಅಲ್ವಾ? [Now I am getting confidence that I can speak English with my son. But all this might be costly, right?] Speaker B: ಇಲ್ಲ ಅಮ್ಮ, just ₹29 for 7 days. [No Amma, just ₹29 for 7 days.] Speaker A: ಏನು? 29 ರೂಪಾಯಿ ಅಂದ್ರೆ ನಮ್ಮ ಹಳ್ಳಿ ಟೀ ಪ್ರೈಸ್ ಗಿಂತ ಕೂಡ ಕಮ್ಮಿ! ಈಗ ನನಗೆ ಯಾವುದೇ ಫಿಯರ್ ಇಲ್ಲ. ಸ್ಲೋಲಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿತಾ ಇದ್ದೀನಿ. ನನ್ನ ಮಗನ ಜೊತೆ ಕಾನ್ಫಿಡೆಂಟ್ ಆಗಿ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತೀನಿ. SpeakX. Every village voice can speak English. Starts at just ₹29 for 7 days. [What? 29 rupees means even less than our village tea price! Now I have no fear. I am slowly learning English. I will speak confidently with my son. SpeakX. Every village voice can speak English. Starts at just ₹29 for 7 days.]
on_screen_text: ENGLISH ANDRE DODDA PROBLEM [English is a big problem] | ANSWER KODOKE BARALLA [Can't answer] | ENGLISH BARALLA ANTA LOW FEEL AGUTTE [Feels low because of no English] | DON'T WORRY AMMA ENGLISH IS NOT DIFFICULT | LET'S START SIMPLE | DAILY JUST 15 MINUTES PRACTICE MADI [Practice 15 mins daily] | JUST ₹29 FOR 7 DAYS | SpeakX: EVERY VILLAGE VOICE CAN SPEAK ENGLISH
summary: A mother shares her struggles with English, feeling embarrassed when she cannot understand her son's teachers. An AI avatar guides her through a simple English-speaking practice session using the SpeakX app. The ad promotes a 7-day trial of the app for just ₹29.
